what_it_does: This file is a living noticeboard guide that synthesizes the FACTORY (composition) area for a union of code/design substrates, summarizing its conceptual model, operating principles, current implementation shape, outputs, and integration seams.
observations: It labels itself a 100% neutral scan synthesis of overlay/, the defined model, journaled history, and finds.
It defines the FACTORY as a type-builder/composition area whose grammar the app instantiates, not the final app itself.
Core model: everything is an asset with a type; trinity of AXES, TYPES, and DATA; four Tim-locked axes (scale/hierarchy, time, frame/perspective, state/phase).
SLOTS are inward properties; SOCKETS are outward joins implemented as separate connection assets carrying provenance.
The CASCADE is a most-specific-wins resolver over axis-space, equated with AI structured-output variable-resolution processing.
Principles include universal composition, derive-don't-instantiate, relative-not-absolute, registry-is-truth, verify-by-use, and map-decides-nothing.
overlay/ is described as a ~5-10% factory shadow; only the V is proven end-to-end and re-skinned to company gold.
The V is the first archetype: an organism-type × DNA-identity × gallery-renderable specimen.
Seams are explicitly upstream to DNA, downstream to gallery/app, and through the company's resolve_address/models layer.
It lists provider, sources, and related board items (e.g., socket contract board://item-534ef183, discriminator board://item-e8391259).
standouts: The cascade is identified as the main AI processing mechanism: structured outputs resolved through variable-resolution factory rules.
The factory/app/gallery split: factory DESCRIBES types, app BUILDS archetypes, gallery SHOWS specimens.
The V organism is positioned as the first worked archetype and proof-by-use reference.
Registry-is-truth and verify-by-use are elevated as core correctness principles.
conventions: YAML frontmatter with id, address, type, state, title, author_session, links, and history entries.
Uses board:// URI identifiers for items and vi-vision:// for address resolution.
References external markdown docs and overlay/MAP/ as sources.
Structured with uppercase section headings and bullet lists.
Uses a star bullet (★) to flag a key convergence claim.
concerns: Heavy jargon and cross-references make the file hard to understand without the referenced docs and overlay map.
It asserts a 100% neutral scan while also making strong convergence claims.
Many terms (Tim-locked, the V, company gold, mode-cascade) are used without in-file definitions.
The upstream DNA wire is described as concrete yet unbuilt, which is ambiguous.
It references several external board items and files whose contents are not shown.
notes: A high-level synthesis guide that maps the FACTORY composition area, its model, principles, proven-vs-designed state, and its seams with DNA and the gallery/app.
questions: What is the exact schema and content of overlay/MAP/ and the V organism?
What does 'Tim-locked' mean for the four axes?
What is the canonical DNA token source that dna-import.js would read?
What is the precise algorithm for 'most-specific-wins' resolution across the four axes?
What are the contents of the socket contract board://item-534ef183 and the discriminator board://item-e8391259?
How does the vi-vision:// address scheme resolve via the company's resolve_address?
What is the current maturity boundary between the proven overlay/ shadow and the designed full system?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches — the title and frontmatter state it is a union synthesis guide for the FACTORY area, and the body delivers a model/principles/shape/outputs/seams synthesis.
apparent_themes: Relative, derived resolution over absolute instantiation
Variable-resolution AI as factory cascade processing
Boundary clarity between describing, building, and exhibiting
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to establish the FACTORY area as the central type-grammar and resolution substrate, align it with upstream DNA and downstream gallery/app, and make honest claims about what is proven versus still designed.
novelty: It treats AI generation as structured-output resolution through a factory cascade, and it re-uses game-engine concepts (UE5 content-browser assets, skeletal sockets, slots) as a general composition grammar.
contribution: The file contributes a vocabulary and principle set for the factory layer (assets, axes, types, data, slots, sockets, cascade), an explicit upstream/downstream seam contract with DNA and gallery/app, and the V archetype as a worked example of the intended composition output.
summary_for_embedding: A living noticeboard guide synthesizing the FACTORY composition area, covering its asset/type/data model, four axes, slot/socket distinction, cascade resolver, principles, proven overlay shadow, outputs, and seams with DNA and the gallery/app.
intention_for_embedding: To document the FACTORY area's conceptual architecture and integration boundaries for a union synthesis of code/design substrates.
